concerns.text: LMM random effects structure not specified. Plan states 'LMM handles hierarchical data (participants × passages)' but does not define random intercepts/slopes. This is critical for proper hierarchical modeling validity in psychology/eye-tracking research.

Valence annotation circularity risk: If NLP sentiment scoring (VADER/TextBlob) is used to derive valence labels, the emotional categorization is not independent of the stimulus text itself. This creates potential confounding between attention patterns and valence labels derived from the same content.

Recall measure validity not verified: Plan assumes 'All recall measures used in the source datasets are validated instruments' but does not specify which measures (free_recall_accuracy vs recognition_score) are primary outcomes or how validity is verified.

Gaze distribution density metric undefined: Described as 'heatmap density or coverage metric' which is not reproducible. Field-standard metrics (e.g., AOI coverage, scanpath entropy) should be specified.
